start_choose_mode:
Welcome to Little Dalat! ☕
Please choose your order mode:
add_items_hint: add more items or send address below
enter_name:
📋 *Order Summary*

We need your details to complete the order.

👤 *Please enter your name:*
enter_address:
📍 *Share your location:*
• Tap the pink 📍 Share Location button below
• Or tap 📎 → Location to drag the pin

✏️ *Or type your address manually:*

🎉 Free delivery for 5+ drinks & desserts!
or_select_map: Or select your location on the map:
distance_check:
📍 Distance from our coffee shop to you: %km% km
🚚 Delivery fee: %fee%k VND
distance_too_far: Sorry, we only deliver within %max% km radius.
payment_qr_info: Scan the QR code below to pay %amount%k VND using any banking app.
payment_qr_waiting: Please transfer and tap the button below after payment.
payment_cash_pickup: 💵 You'll pay when you pick up your order at the cafe.
payment_cash_delivery: 💵 You'll pay upon receiving when staff delivers your order.
